name: cuebook
description: Query Cuebook market intelligence or compile a creator-owned market viewpoint into a sourced editorial Frame.

interface.shortDescription: Query Cuebook or create a sourced editorial Frame
interface.longDescription: Cuebook has two explicit modules. Query searches, reads, compares, and explains Cuebook assets, stories, Frames, evidence, market data, metrics, and history without writing anything. Create preserves and sharpens the user's viewpoint, asks at most one optional high-leverage question, and runs one bounded Cuebook-first evidence pass before returning one recommended Frame. Every Frame has one title, one concise body, and one paired 2488 x 1056 editorial image. The V2 expression compiler chooses the analytical relationship before the layout, then deterministically renders price or indexed curves, relative spread, drawdown and recovery, rolling correlation, event windows, threshold regimes, causal spines, evidence balance, or conditional scenario lanes. Observed history and unresolved future time remain visibly separate; causal hypotheses stay creator-owned, and no future price path or uncalibrated probability fan is fabricated. Three alternatives are generated together only when requested and must differ structurally, not merely by color. Release packaging waits until selection. Initial and correction publication use the active publish grant plus the explicit first-party publish action; only withdrawal requires separate consent.
defaultPrompt: 查询 USO 最新叙事、市场状态和来源
比较 HOOD 与 COIN 的最新估值口径和市场表现
我觉得 BTC 未来 30 天会比现在高，帮我做成标题、正文和配图完整的 Frame
